title: Hasagat Gvul: Fair Competition in Jewish Business Law
title_zh: 哈萨噶特·格武尔:犹太商业法中的公平竞争
title_he: הסגת גבול: תחרות הוגנת בדיני עסקים יהודיים
key_concepts: Four categories: geographic, intellectual, reputational, poaching
Chinese parallel: Bu Yi Zhi Cai (不义之财 - unjust wealth)
Modern applications: intellectual property, non-compete, online reviews
Balance between competition and protection of livelihood
cultural_parallels: Bu Yi Zhi Cai (不义之财) - unjust wealth concept
Chinese historical dynasties: Shang, Han, Jin, Song, Ming

historical_periods.chinese: Han Dynasty (汉朝) to Jin Dynasty (晋朝)
Song to Ming Dynasty (宋明时期)

target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers with no prior Jewish knowledge
